headline: Defense Stocks Are Stabilizing. When to Buy.
summary: The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF rallied 23% to $250, then fell 16% to $210. It is now stabilizing around $217.

headline: Signals from the Strait: Studying the Leading Effects of Oil Price Shocks on Private Markets
summary: Companies and Markets By Edward McCormick | May 4, 2026 All eyes are on oil. With the Strait of Hormuz transformed into a critical chokepoint, we examined how oil shocks have impacted private markets...
